title: Develop and implement a breeding strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement a breeding strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan breeding program

pcs.text: Assess and clarify breeding requirements to meet workplace production goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and clarify breeding requirements to meet workplace production goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and clarify breeding requirements to meet workplace production goals.

pcs.text: Identify and arrange resources to support breeding requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and arrange resources to support breeding requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and arrange resources to support breeding requirements.

pcs.text: Select breeding options to optimise results and consistency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select breeding options to optimise results and consistency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select breeding options to optimise results and consistency.

pcs.text: Undertake economic assessment to establish the feasibility of the breeding objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake economic assessment to establish the feasibility of the breeding objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake economic assessment to establish the feasibility of the breeding objectives.

pcs.text: Formulate breeding program to meet workplace objectives, and ensure sufficient flexibility to accommodate contingencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Formulate breeding program to meet workplace objectives, and ensure sufficient flexibility to accommodate contingencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate breeding program to meet workplace objectives, and ensure sufficient flexibility to accommodate contingencies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan breeding program

elements.title: Select livestock for breeding

pcs.text: Determine selection criteria for the visual and objective methods of selecting livestock based on heritability and economic returns for the workplace

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine selection criteria for the visual and objective methods of selecting livestock based on heritability and economic returns for the workplace.

pcs.text: Establish culling and replacement practices to maintain or improve herd or flock size, animal ratios and grade of livestock

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish culling and replacement practices to maintain or improve herd or flock size, animal ratios and grade of livestock.

pcs.text: Assess genetic gain potential to determine and justify herd or flock structure

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess genetic gain potential to determine and justify herd or flock structure.

pcs.text: Source suitable genetic material to optimise genetic gain within the herd or flock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source suitable genetic material to optimise genetic gain within the herd or flock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source suitable genetic material to optimise genetic gain within the herd or flock.

pcs.text: Check and monitor selected livestock to ensure condition and welfare status meets breeding program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and monitor selected livestock to ensure condition and welfare status meets breeding program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and monitor selected livestock to ensure condition and welfare status meets breeding program requirements.

pcs.text: Carry out measurements of production and genetic characteristics, and evaluate results within appropriate breeding program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out measurements of production and genetic characteristics, and evaluate results within appropriate breeding program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out measurements of production and genetic characteristics, and evaluate results within appropriate breeding program requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select livestock for breeding

elements.title: Monitor breeding program

pcs.text: Supervise implementation of the breeding program for efficiency and effectiveness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise implementation of the breeding program for efficiency and effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise implementation of the breeding program for efficiency and effectiveness.

pcs.text: Prioritise and implement changes necessary to achieve breeding aims according to breeding program requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prioritise and implement changes necessary to achieve breeding aims according to breeding program requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine and control allocated resources within workplace budgetary constraints.

pcs.text: Observe and comply with animal welfare industry standards, legislation and codes of practice and procedures relevant to livestock production

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and comply with animal welfare industry standards, legislation and codes of practice and procedures relevant to livestock production.
